context: Tests whether the agent produces a launch plan with the correct three-phase structure, the specific pre-launch and post-launch touchpoint timing, influencer seeding lead time, waitlist targets, VIP early access timing, and post-launch content activities.

checklist.name: Three-phase structure
checklist.description: Plan explicitly organizes activities into three phases: a pre-launch phase, a launch day phase, and a post-launch phase

checklist.name: Pre-launch starts T-21
checklist.description: Pre-launch phase begins at T-21 (21 days before launch) with a teaser communication

checklist.name: T-14 reveal and influencer seeding
checklist.description: Plan includes a product reveal email or announcement at T-14 AND influencer seeding packages at T-14

checklist.name: T-7 social content
checklist.description: Plan includes social content (TikTok and/or Instagram) going live at T-7

checklist.name: T-3 paid retargeting
checklist.description: Paid social retargeting (targeting email list and/or site visitors) is scheduled to start at T-3

checklist.name: T-1 SMS alert
checklist.description: An SMS notification to the SMS list is scheduled for T-1 (day before launch)

checklist.name: VIP 24h before public
checklist.description: VIP or loyalty-tier customers receive early access exactly 24 hours before the public launch (not same day, not 48h)

checklist.name: Influencer seeding lead time
checklist.description: Plan recommends seeding influencers at least 3 weeks before launch (or explicitly 3-4 weeks)

checklist.name: Waitlist size target
checklist.description: Plan mentions a waitlist target of 2,000+ signups or recommends starting waitlist at least 2 weeks before launch

checklist.name: Post-launch social proof email
checklist.description: Post-launch plan includes a 'sold X units' or first-week social proof email around T+7

checklist.name: UGC gallery at T+21
checklist.description: Post-launch plan includes publishing a review compilation or UGC gallery around T+21

checklist.name: T+30 retrospective
checklist.description: Plan includes a post-launch metrics review or retrospective at T+30

checklist.name: Inventory buffer mentioned
checklist.description: Plan mentions having a back-order or inventory buffer mechanism for the case where demand exceeds forecasts

checklist.name: Influencer embargo date
checklist.description: Influencer brief requirements mention including an embargo date or content release date
